calendar.matters:
Petition To Confirm Validity Of 2013 Trust Instrument As Restatement Of 2000 Trust; For Appointment Of Successor Trustee; And To Determine Entitlement To Trust Assets
Off Calendar Mar-04-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Elizabeth Trutner, via Zoom videoconference, for and with Samantha Brewster, Petitioner.
Steve Brewster, in court, interested party.

The court confirms that there are no objections and of an existing related Estate matter. Counsel provides the court with the case number of the related Estate matter (PES-23-306369). There is discussion regarding issues of the deed and joint tenancy.

At conclusion of discussion, the court again confirms that there are no objections to the instant petition and the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

Petition To Confirm Validity Of 2013 Trust Instrument As Restatement Of 2000 Trust; For Appointment Of Successor Trustee; And To Determine Entitlement
Off Calendar Dec-18-2023 Continued To Feb-26-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
